prose.en: Implement hardware-enforced separation and policy enforcement mechanisms between {param:sc-49_odp}.

guidance.en: System owners may require additional strength of mechanism and robustness to ensure domain separation and policy enforcement for specific types of threats and environments of operation. Hardware-enforced separation and policy enforcement provide greater strength of mechanism than software-enforced separation and policy enforcement.

prose.en: hardware-enforced separation and policy enforcement mechanisms are implemented between {param:sc-49_odp}.

objects.en: system configuration settings and associated documentation
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
organizational personnel installing, configuring, and/or maintaining the system
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing hardware-enforced security domain separation and policy enforcement

guidelines.en: security domains requiring hardware-enforced separation and policy enforcement mechanisms are defined;
